en: Pulling down her pants, yanking off my own.
Underneath the mistletoe, I'll make your sister moan.
Oh, Heather's hot, Heather's hot, we'll go all the way.
ko: 오, 헤더는 핫해, 헤더는 핫해, 끝까지 갈 거야.

en: I wish I could see her naked, I wish I could see her naked.
I wish I could see her naked and down on all fours.
ko: 그녀가 벗고 네 발로 기는 걸 보고 싶어.

en: Ted has a little sister, gets hotter every day.
ko: 테드의 여동생이 있는데, 날마다 점점 더 예뻐져.

en: And if I ever meet her with her boobies, I will play.
ko: 그녀를 만나면 가슴을 가지고 놀 거야.

en: What? I can celebrate Hanukkah, too.
ko: 뭐? 나도 하누카 축하할 수 있어.
